phrases.afrikaans: Ons is gereed, om te bestel.
phrases.transliteration: Ons is ge-red, om te bes-tel.

phrases.english: Connect with people, share your stories.
Travel South Africa, experience it all.
You can do this, believe it.
phrases.afrikaans: Jy kan dit doen, glo daarin.
phrases.transliteration: Yai kahn dit doon, hloo dah-reen.

phrases.afrikaans: Hou aan oefen, dit word makliker.
phrases.transliteration: Hoo ahn oo-fen, dit vort mahk-lik-er.

phrases.afrikaans: Haal diep asem, laat los, vrede.
phrases.transliteration: Haal deep ah-sem, laat los, vray-deh.

phrases.english: Slow and steady, wins the race.
phrases.afrikaans: Stadig en rustig, wen die wedloop.
phrases.transliteration: Stah-dikh en rus-tikh, ven dee vehd-loop.

phrases.english: Take your time, with each step.
phrases.afrikaans: Neem jou tyd, met elke tree.
phrases.transliteration: Nehm yow teyd, met eh-l-keh tray.

phrases.english: Good things, come to those who wait.
phrases.afrikaans: Goeie dinge, kom vir die wagters.
phrases.transliteration: Hoo-yeh din-geh, kom fir dee vahkh-tahrs.

phrases.english: Breathe in, breathe out, be calm.
phrases.afrikaans: Haal asem in, haal asem uit, wees kalm.
phrases.transliteration: Hahl ah-sem in, hahl ah-sem oyt, vehs kalm.

phrases.english: Let your ideas flow, like water.
phrases.afrikaans: Laat jou idees vloei, soos water.
phrases.transliteration: Laat yoh ee-day-as vlooi, soos wah-ter.

phrases.english: Paint your world, with bold strokes.
phrases.afrikaans: Verf jou wêreld, met vet strepe.

phrases.english: Build your vision, brick by brick.
phrases.afrikaans: Bou jou visie, klip vir klip.
phrases.transliteration: Bou yoh fee-see, klip fir klip.

phrases.english: Believe in yourself, you can do it.
phrases.afrikaans: Glo in jouself, jy kan dit doen.
phrases.transliteration: Gloo fin yoo-self, yee kahn dit din.

phrases.english: You are stronger than you think.
phrases.afrikaans: Jy is sterker as wat jy dink.
phrases.transliteration: Yee is ster-ker as vaht yee dink.

phrases.afrikaans: Deel jou glimlag, dit is gratis.
phrases.transliteration: Deel you GLIM-lakh, dit is KRA-tis.

phrases.english: Where is the nearest train station?
I would like a coffee, please.
phrases.afrikaans: Ek wil graag koffie hê, asseblief.
phrases.transliteration: Ek vil khrahkh kof-fee hay, ah-se-bleef.

phrases.english: I am just looking, thank you.
Where can I find, the bread?
Let it happen, in its own time.
phrases.afrikaans: Laat dit gebeur, op sy eie tyd.
phrases.transliteration: Laht dit kheh-beur, op sy ey-yeh teyd.

phrases.afrikaans: Hou aan probeer, moenie opgee nie.
phrases.transliteration: Hoh ahn pro-beh-er, moo-nee op-kheh nee-eh.

phrases.english: Every seed, needs time to grow.
phrases.afrikaans: Elke saad, het tyd nodig om te groei.
phrases.transliteration: Eh-l-keh sahd, het teyd noh-dikh om teh khroo-y.

phrases.english: Trust the journey, it will be fine.
phrases.afrikaans: Vertrou die reis, dit sal goed gaan.
phrases.transliteration: Fir-trow dee reys, dit sahl khood khahn.

phrases.english: Discover your spark, and ignite it.
phrases.afrikaans: Ontdek jou vonk, en steek dit aan.
phrases.transliteration: Ont-dek yoh vonk, en steek dit aan.

phrases.english: Make beautiful things, from simple ideas.
phrases.afrikaans: Maak mooi dinge, uit eenvoudige idees.
phrases.transliteration: Maak moy din-geh, ayt en-fow-di-geh ee-day-as.

phrases.afrikaans: Maak jou hart oop, met vriendelikheid.
phrases.transliteration: Mahk yoh hart oop, met vreen-deh-lik-hayt.

phrases.english: Notice your breath, a gentle rhythm.
This moment, is all there is.
phrases.afrikaans: Hierdie oomblik, is alles wat is.
phrases.transliteration: Heer-dee oom-blik, is ah-less vath is.

phrases.afrikaans: Vir altyd, saam met jou, asseblief.
phrases.transliteration: Fur al-teit, sam met yew, as-uh-bleef.

phrases.afrikaans: Tree nou op, moenie wag nie.
phrases.transliteration: Tree noy op, moo-nee vahg nee.

phrases.english: Slowly, you learn, quickly you grow.
phrases.afrikaans: Stadig leer jy, vinnig groei jy.
phrases.transliteration: Stah-dikh leer yuh, fin-nikh grooy yuh.

phrases.english: Listen well, speak less, understand more.
phrases.afrikaans: Luister goed, praat min, verstaan meer.
phrases.transliteration: Loo-ster khoot, praht min, fer-stahn meer.

phrases.afrikaans: Foute is lesse, nie mislukkings nie.
phrases.transliteration: Fow-tuh is less-uh, nee mis-luk-kings nee.

phrases.english: Be patient, with yourself, and the language.
phrases.afrikaans: Wees geduldig, met jouself, en die taal.
phrases.transliteration: Wees khuh-dul-dikh, met yow-self, en dee tahl.

phrases.english: Each day, get a little better.

phrases.transliteration: Yai is an kho-eh vrrind, rehg-tikh.

phrases.afrikaans: Kom ons sien mekaar gou, goed?
phrases.transliteration: Kom ons seen me-kar kow, khoot?

phrases.afrikaans: Dankie dat jy altyd daar is.
phrases.transliteration: Dahn-kee daht yai ahl-taid dahr is.

phrases.english: I value our friendship, a lot.
Do you have, this in blue?
I will take this one, please.
Thank you, have a good day.
Let's tackle this project, with energy.
phrases.afrikaans: Kom ons pak hierdie projek, met energie aan.
phrases.transliteration: Kom ons pak heer-deh pro-yek, met en-er-ghee ahn.

phrases.english: The deadline is near, focus now.
phrases.afrikaans: Die sperdatum is naby, fokus nou.
phrases.transliteration: Dee sper-dah-tum is nah-beh, fo-kus now.

phrases.english: Teamwork makes it easy, let's collaborate.
phrases.afrikaans: Spanwerk maak dit maklik, kom ons span saam.
phrases.transliteration: Span-werk mahk dit mahk-lik, kom ons span sahm.

phrases.english: This task is challenging, but doable.
phrases.afrikaans: Hierdie taak is uitdagend, maar doenbaar.
phrases.transliteration: Hee-deh tahk is oyt-dah-hant, mah doo-bar.

phrases.english: We need to brainstorm, for new ideas.
phrases.afrikaans: Ons moet breinstorm, vir nuwe idees.
phrases.transliteration: Ons moot breyn-storm, fir noo-veh ee-day-s.

phrases.english: My beloved sister, full of joy.
This little spot, is quite charming.
May I have, another drink, please?
Could we sit, by the window?
phrases.afrikaans: Sal ons, by die venster, sit?
phrases.transliteration: Sal ons, bei die fen-ster, sit?

phrases.english: We need, a bit more time.
My heart, is full of joy.
Taste the sunshine, feel the joy.
phrases.afrikaans: Proe die sonlig, voel die vreugde.
phrases.transliteration: Prooh dee son-lik, feel dee vreh-geh.

phrases.english: Sing with passion, dance with heart.
phrases.afrikaans: Sing met passie, dans met hart.
phrases.transliteration: Sing met pas-see, dans met hart.

phrases.english: Explore new flavors, find your own.
phrases.afrikaans: Verken nuwe geure, vind jou eie.
phrases.transliteration: Fer-ken nü-veh geu-reh, vind yow ey-eh.

phrases.english: A sky, so blue, it hurts.
phrases.afrikaans: 'n Hemel, so blou, dit maak seer.
phrases.transliteration: 'n Heh-mel, soh bloo, dit mahk sehr.

phrases.english: Her dress, a soft, pale pink.
Afrikaans is, a journey, of discovery.
Unlock new sounds, speak with joy.
phrases.afrikaans: Ontsluit nuwe klanke, praat met vreugde.
phrases.transliteration: Ontsluit nuwe klanke, praat met vreugde.

phrases.english: A single phrase, a world opens.
Connect with culture, word by word.
phrases.afrikaans: Verbind met kultuur, woord vir woord.
phrases.transliteration: Verbind met kultuur, woord vir woord.

phrases.english: Where can I, find a shop?
Unlock new sounds, embrace the flow.
phrases.afrikaans: Ontsluit nuwe klanke, omarm die vloei.
phrases.transliteration: Ont-sluit nu-vuh klan-kuh, om-arm dee vlooi.

phrases.english: Weave your thoughts, into a tapestry.
Shape the clay, of your mind.
phrases.afrikaans: Vorm die klei, van jou verstand.
phrases.transliteration: Vorm die klei, van yow verstand.

phrases.english: Whisper your dreams, to the wind.
phrases.afrikaans: Fluister jou drome, vir die wind.
phrases.transliteration: Fluister yow drome, fur die vind.

phrases.english: Plant a seed, of pure wonder.
Sketch the unseen, with your heart.
phrases.afrikaans: Skets die ongesiene, met jou hart.
phrases.transliteration: Skets die onghesiene, met yow hart.

phrases.english: A warm thought, sent your way.
Lend a hand, if you're able.
phrases.afrikaans: Bied 'n hand aan, as jy kan.
phrases.transliteration: Bee-d 'n han-d an, as jy kan.

phrases.english: Unlock new worlds, one word at a time.
phrases.afrikaans: Ontsluit nuwe wêrelde, een woord op 'n slag.
phrases.transliteration: Ont-sluit noo-weh-veh-reh-ldeh, een vord op 'n slach.

phrases.english: Find your voice, in a beautiful tongue.
phrases.afrikaans: Vind jou stem, in 'n pragtige taal.
phrases.transliteration: Vind yoh stem, in 'n prach-tih-ge tahl.

phrases.english: Expand your horizons, with this language.
phrases.afrikaans: Verbreed jou horisonne, met hierdie taal.
phrases.transliteration: Ver-breed yoh hor-ri-son-neh, met hier-die tahl.

phrases.english: Enrich your mind, learn something new.
phrases.afrikaans: Verryk jou gedagtes, leer iets nuuts.
phrases.transliteration: Ver-reik yoh ghe-dach-tess, lehr eets noots.

phrases.afrikaans: Maak nuwe deure oop, na geleenthede.
phrases.transliteration: Mach noo-weh deh-reh oop, nah ghe-lehn-theh-deh.

phrases.english: Two hours, maybe, then we leave.
phrases.afrikaans: Twee ure, dalk, dan vertrek ons.
phrases.transliteration: Twee u-reh, dalk, dan fer-trek ons.

phrases.english: Three days, no more, we're done.
phrases.afrikaans: Drie dae, nie meer, ons is klaar.
phrases.transliteration: Drie da-eh, nee meer, ons is klahr.

phrases.english: Four weeks, a long time, isn't it?
phrases.afrikaans: Vier weke, 'n lang tyd, nie waar nie?
phrases.transliteration: Veer ve-keh, 'n lang teit, nee vahr nee?

phrases.english: Five miles, almost there, so close.
phrases.afrikaans: Vyf myl, amper daar, so naby.
phrases.transliteration: Feif meil, am-per dahr, so nah-beh.

phrases.english: The sound, of progress, is joy.
phrases.afrikaans: Die klank, van vooruitgang, is bly.
phrases.transliteration: Dee klank, fan voor-rayt-ghank, is blai.

phrases.english: Embrace the struggle, learn from it.

phrases.afrikaans: Trek netjies aan, groet die dag.
phrases.transliteration: Trek net-yees ahn, groot dee dahg.
